components.text: MediHelp Service: Ambulance services are now at ur finger

* 📍 **Available Everywhere in Assam*:* No matter where you are, our services will reach you.
 * ⏱️ **Lightning-Fast Response*:* After booking, an ambulance will arrive at your doorstep within 30 minutes (or even less).
 * 📱 **Easy Booking Process*:* Book a vehicle quickly and effortlessly through our user-friendly app.
 * 🩺 **Emergency Support*:* Our ambulances are equipped with necessary medical tools and operated by skilled drivers.
